_demo_notice: DEMO DATA — override by mounting your own schema_config.json at /home/zemtik/.zemtik/schema_config.json

client_portfolios.description: Total asset value across client portfolios, aggregated by sector or asset class.
example_prompts: What is the total portfolio value in Q1 2024?
Total assets under management by sector
Portfolio value for tech sector this quarter

portfolio_risk.description: Risk exposure metrics and concentration counts across client portfolios.
example_prompts: How many clients have exposure to fixed income?
Client concentration in healthcare sector Q1 2024
How many positions in energy sector?
